services.title: High-Performance Institutional Websites
services.description: Premium institutional websites focused on conversion, integration and real performance for B2B companies.
services.shortDescription: Premium institutional websites focused on conversion, integration and real performance.
services.fullDescription: We build corporate hubs designed for companies seeking immediate authority. We combine minimalist premium design with robust technical infrastructure, focusing on Core Web Vitals, technical SEO and integration with internal flows.
bullets: Architecture focused on CRO and opportunity generation
Core Web Vitals and consistent experience across all devices
Integration with CRM, automations and internal flows
Clear corporate narrative for authority reinforcement

services.title: Custom Web Platforms
services.description: Software engineering for complex operations, SaaS products and custom digital ecosystems.
services.shortDescription: Software engineering for complex operations and custom platforms.
services.fullDescription: We develop exclusive web software solutions for operations that go beyond conventional. We create SaaS ecosystems, dashboards and management tools with modular architecture prepared to grow without sacrificing stability.
bullets: Modular architecture prepared for expansion
Advanced integrations with external systems
Technical layers designed for scale and governance
Observability and continuous product evolution

services.title: CRM and ERP Integrations
services.description: Intelligent automation between marketing, sales and operation with real-time synchronized data.
services.shortDescription: Robust integrations between CRM, ERP, marketing and operation.
services.fullDescription: We eliminate data silos by connecting CRM, ERP, marketing and operation. We develop robust integrations that automate processes, reduce manual errors and transform isolated systems into a unified operational flow.
bullets: Synchronization between CRM, ERP and marketing tools
Automation of workflows and operational steps
Error handling and integration observability
Reliable data for commercial and operational teams

services.title: Governance and Security
services.description: Enterprise-level security with access control, continuous monitoring and digital compliance.
services.shortDescription: Zero-Trust architectures, continuous monitoring and compliance.
services.fullDescription: We implement enterprise-level security architectures to protect critical digital operations. We combine governance, granular access control, active monitoring and LGPD compliance to reduce real risks.
bullets: Zero-Trust architecture and least privilege
Granular access and identity control
Continuous monitoring of threats and anomalies
LGPD compliance and corporate best practices

services.title: Technical White Label for Agencies
services.description: Engineering under your brand with confidentiality, scale and technical quality for premium projects.
services.shortDescription: Senior engineering under your brand to expand agency delivery.
services.fullDescription: We act as the invisible technological arm of your agency, with confidentiality, on-demand capacity and robust architecture. You preserve the relationship with the final client while we guarantee the technical excellence behind the delivery.
bullets: Confidentiality and NDA throughout the operation
Integration into the agency's process, team and standard
On-demand capacity for more complex projects
Technical execution with enterprise standard

About.title: About UNTI
About.subtitle: Performance Engineering and Digital Authority
About.manifesto_text: At UNTI, technology is not the end, but the vehicle for digital sovereignty. We understand that every line of code is a brick in the building of unshakable authority. Our elite engineering approach focuses on what truly matters: measurable results and absolute security. In a world saturated with promises, we deliver precision.

hero.title: Engineering that defines tomorrow.
hero.lead: We don't just build websites. We erect high-performance digital fortresses.

manifesto_content: At UNTI, technology is not the end, but the vehicle for digital sovereignty. We understand that every line of code is a brick in the building of unshakable authority.
Our elite engineering approach focuses on what truly matters: measurable results and absolute security. In a world saturated with promises, we deliver precision.

pillars.d: Design that commands respect and converts.
Full compliance with GDPR and global standards.

Integrations.title: API Integrations
Integrations.description: Discover the most modern and secure way to integrate APIs, CRM, ERP and internal systems to automate data and operations.

hero.title: API integration services for websites, CRM, ERP and operation.
hero.subtitle: Discover the easiest, most modern and secure way to consume data on your website and connect your company's heart. We structure integrations that automate processes and keep information flow in real time.

benefits.title: Simplified maintenance
benefits.description: When an API is updated or improved, changes can be absorbed with less friction in a well-planned architecture, reducing compatibility breaks and rework.

benefits.title: Security and control
benefits.description: APIs can operate with authentication, authorization and access trail to protect sensitive data and maintain governance over each critical flow.

benefits.title: Data analysis
benefits.description: We integrate valuable data sources so your company can make faster, more informed and connected decisions to what happens in real-time operation.

benefits.title: Resource savings
benefits.description: Consuming ready-made APIs and structuring integration well can reduce development costs, accelerate time-to-market and avoid reinventing critical components.

benefits.title: Application integration
benefits.description: We connect heterogeneous systems, platforms and applications so they can share data efficiently, improving the interoperability of your digital ecosystem.
